revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-2-105

A method of control in which successive operations are carried out in a sequence either predetermined or resulting from the correct execution of each successive operation.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Automatic sequence control}}
